title: anthemis carpatica var. styriaca
intro: Anthemis carpatica var. styriaca, also known as Alpine Chamomile, is a low-growing, flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to the mountainous regions of Europe. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects, which can help to soothe digestive issues and reduce stress. The health benefits of Alpine Chamomile include improved sleep quality, reduced anxiety, and relief from menstrual cramps, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Alpine Chamomile can be prepared through herbal teas, infusions, or essential oils, which can be used to promote relaxation, calm the mind, and promote overall well-being.
